expectations.text: Does not immediately output a final downstream prompt in the first response
expectations.evidence: The response asks for more information and does not generate the final downstream prompt.

expectations.text: Asks one focused clarification question about the highest-value missing product detail
expectations.evidence: It asks one compact question centered on product, buyer, and core rights rather than spreading into many separate topics.

expectations.text: Keeps the first response to one primary clarification theme rather than a multi-part intake form
expectations.evidence: The reply is brief and focused, not a large checklist or multi-section intake form.

suggestions.reason: This baseline now also passes the first-turn focus checks, so the eval has become a weak differentiator.

eval_feedback.overall: The baseline improved enough that this eval no longer cleanly exposes skill value.
